title: Project-Oriented Conversational Operator
summary: Created the implementation contract for making Maraithon project-oriented and conversation-first, then immediately started Phase 1 implementation for project primitives and project-aware conversational context.
next_action: Implement the first slice: add the `projects` schema/context, associate agents to projects, and expose project data to the conversational assistant.

verification.notes: Initial spec written and implementation started in the same turn.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Wrote the canonical spec for projects, state scopes, specialist catalog semantics, and the first implementation slice.
pending_steps: Expose projects in conversational assistant context and tools
Run `mix precommit` and send a Telegram completion notice if configuration is available
open_questions: Whether project deletion should detach agents automatically or remain blocked until reassignment
Whether the first project-aware assistant tools should include project creation writes immediately or stay read-mostly
resume_context.notes: This spec intentionally treats Telegram as the first push surface, not the product boundary.

history.note: Created a new spec for the project-oriented conversational operator model built on connected accounts, specialist agents, projects, and one natural-language assistant.
Started Phase 1 implementation for project primitives, project-aware agent association, and conversational context exposure.
